resources.string: Eyes burst. Blood boils. Jaws tear.

No thought. No pause. The throat ruptures and still roars. Chains bind the blade to the wrist. Blood steams in a red mist. An arm is gone. The body does not care. It lunges. It bites. It tastes iron. Reason was a cage. Rage is the key. Break it. Strike. Cleave. Tear.
Iron tastes sweet. The rusted chain sings. Every swing is a chorus of ruin, tearing through armor and flesh alike until only the red mist remains.

Throats tear from the roar. The sound does not stop. A heavy blade is welded to the wrist. It stays even in death. Skin burns. Blood turns to mist. To think is to hesitate. To hesitate is to die. The cage of sanity shatters. Only rage remains. Destroy. Annihilate. Break them all.
